---
title: "Projects"
listing:
    contents: projects
    feed:
      items: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    image-height: "25"
    categories: true
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, description, image, categories]
    image-placeholder: https://cdn.pixabay.com/photo/2020/01/07/06/36/web-4746871_1280.png
    page-size: 25
    date-format: long
---
